subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Make that yearning seeker exalted in Thy Kingdom and set upon his head a crown of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار آن مشتاق ديدار را در ملکوتت بزرگوار کن و تاجی  از موهبت بر سر نه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
